configFiles.instrumentation: apps/web/instrumentation.ts — imports captureRequestError from @sentry/nextjs; register() dynamically imports sentry.server.config for nodejs runtime and sentry.edge.config for edge runtime; exports onRequestError = captureRequestError
configFiles.clientConfig: apps/web/instrumentation-client.ts — calls Sentry init() with NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN, configures tracesSampleRate, replayIntegration, and enableLogs; exports onRouterTransitionStart = captureRouterTransitionStart
configFiles.serverConfig: apps/web/sentry.server.config.ts — calls Sentry init() with SENTRY_DSN ?? NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN, configures tracesSampleRate and enableLogs
configFiles.edgeConfig: apps/web/sentry.edge.config.ts — calls Sentry init() with SENTRY_DSN ?? NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN, configures tracesSampleRate and enableLogs
configFiles.globalError: apps/web/src/app/global-error.tsx — client component that calls captureException(error) in useEffect and renders NextError

evidence.nextConfig: apps/web/next.config.ts — imports withSentryConfig from @sentry/nextjs and wraps nextConfig: export default withSentryConfig(nextConfig, { silent, authToken, widenClientFileUpload, tunnelRoute: '/monitoring', bundleSizeOptimizations })

envSchema.processEnvMapping: processEnv object maps SENTRY_DSN from process.env.SENTRY_DSN and NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN from process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN

configFilesUseEnvVar.serverConfig: sentry.server.config.ts reads DSN via process.env.SENTRY_DSN ?? process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN — no hardcoded string
configFilesUseEnvVar.edgeConfig: sentry.edge.config.ts reads DSN via process.env.SENTRY_DSN ?? process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN — no hardcoded string
configFilesUseEnvVar.clientConfig: instrumentation-client.ts reads DSN via process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN — no hardcoded string
configFilesUseEnvVar.nextConfig: next.config.ts reads authToken via process.env.SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN — no hardcoded credentials

evidence.noHardcodedDSN: Grep for '@sentry' across apps/web shows all DSN references use process.env — zero hardcoded DSN strings found

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-FOUND-010: @sentry/nextjs is properly installed and configured with instrumentation.ts, instrumentation-client.ts (modern Next.js 16 pattern replacing sentry.client.config.ts), sentry.server.config.ts, sentry.edge.config.ts, global-error.tsx, and next.config.ts wraps with withSentryConfig. VAL-FOUND-011: Sentry DSN is read exclusively from environment variables (SENTRY_DSN and NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN) in all config files, both variables are declared in the Zod env validation schema with url() validation.
